title: justicia lenticellata
intro: Justicia lenticellata, also known as the spotted justicia or blue throat, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The leaves and flowers of Justicia lenticellata have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and other medicinal products.
